rawContent:
Tweet by @Gavriel_Cohen (Gavriel Cohen)
Author bio: Creator of NanoClaw; ex VP at Concrete Media; ex https://t.co/LCZI5lx0sx developer team lead; BSc Physics and Computer Science at Tel Aviv University; @NanoClaw_AI
Text: Agents can't be trusted with sensitive data and actions.

OneCLI solves this with a zero trust vault for agents.

Agent credential management & agent-level policies are unsolved. None of the big labs have put forward an answer.

NanoClaw and OneCLI are building both in the open. https://t.co/L6n6k2DAGa
